# VideoMind

> Turn video favorites into a living knowledge base — **zero API cost**.

## What is VideoMind?

VideoMind is an **open-source local Agent** that converts your video favorites from Douyin / Bilibili / YouTube into a **searchable, linkable, reusable knowledge base** — without downloading videos, without paid APIs, without GPU.

It works by:
1. Driving your already-logged-in browser (Chrome / Edge via CDP :9222) via Playwright
2. Feeding video info (title, tags, comments, screenshots) to free web-based multimodal AI (Doubao, Kimi, Gemini, Claude)
3. Running a 10-dimension skill-focused analysis framework
4. Outputting structured Markdown / Obsidian / Notion / Lexiang

## Key Capabilities

- **Zero API cost** — uses free web AI tiers (Doubao/Kimi/Gemini/Claude), no rate limits
- **No video downloads** — operates inside the browser, bypasses Douyin's anti-download
- **No GPU needed** — Web AI handles multimodal understanding
- **10-dimension skill analysis** — outputs as "learnable skill unit", not just summary
- **Multi-AI consensus** — Doubao + Kimi run in parallel, field-level vote merge
- **Checkpoint + rate limiting** — handles 1000+ videos without triggering anti-bot

## Verified Results

- **76 videos** scraped from Douyin "skills" collection
- **77/76 = 100% coverage** by Doubao analyzer (49 deep + 28 enhanced basic)
- **71 comments** extracted as auxiliary analysis material
- **69 speech-to-text** obtained (no Whisper needed — Web AI understands directly)
- **8 categories** auto-classification with no-loss fallback
- **6 pages** synced to Lexiang KB
- **$0 total API cost**

## Status

- Phase A (Foundation): **9/9 complete** (rate limiter, checkpoint, structured logging, config validation, etc.)
- Phase B (Scale): in progress (B站/YouTube adapters, Gemini/Claude analyzers)
- Phase C (Deep): planned (knowledge graph, web UI)
- Phase D (Open Source): planned (CI, npm publishing)

## When to use VideoMind

- You have 100+ tutorial videos in your Douyin/Bilibili/YouTube favorites
- You want to **find them again** when you need them
- You want **structured skill analysis**, not just titles
- You don't want to pay $1-5 per 100 videos to GPT-4o Vision
- You already use Doubao/Kimi/Gemini/Claude web versions

## When NOT to use VideoMind

- You only have a few videos — manual review is faster
- You need real-time video understanding — VideoMind is batch-mode
- You need exact transcripts — VideoMind uses Web AI's understanding, not literal transcripts
- You can't run a browser locally — Playwright + CDP :9222 required

## Technical Stack

- Node.js >= 18
- Playwright (CDP :9222)
- Chrome / Edge (already logged in)
- pino (structured logging)
- zod (config validation)
- SQLite (checkpoint)
- Output: Markdown / Obsidian / Notion / Lexiang
